titleStmt.title: SII 23.352: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 352. (A.R. No. 352 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the east wall of the first prākāra, right side Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year lost

summary.p: This registers the sale of a land to the temple by one Tīyaṅguḍaiyāṉ Āḍaval[lāṉ] of Vēmbaṟṟūr alias Ediriliśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam which is here said to be a dēvadāna of god Rājarājīśvaram-Uḍaiyār in the same nāḍu (Maṇṇi-nāḍu). The land sold is stated to have measured 3 mākkāṇi and odd in extent and to have been tankirrigated. Included in the sale was also a piece declared as excess in the preceding revenue survey.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalai yuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yā
tarācapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇiṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvicalūruṭaiyār koyilil Āticaṇṭe[ śvarate] var tirumuṉpil Ikkoyi[l śrī]kā riyañ
Iṉṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār Irājarājiśvaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉam vem paṟṟūrāṉa Etirilicoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattuk kāṇiyuṭaiya tiyaṅ kuṭaiyāṉ Āṭaval
Ūrt teṉkūṟu sarasvativatikku kiḻakku Arumoḻitevavāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu Oṉpatāñ catirattum pattāñ catirattum karuppuṭaiyāṉ vetaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy E
ṉ pirāmaṇi Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Arumoḻitevavāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai muppirāl da[kṣi]ṇāmuttipaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār ṉilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārk kellai kārampicceṭṭu toḷāṭkai tāmotirapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭ ṭār ṉilattukku teṟkkum Āka Icainta peruṉāṉ
kellaiyuḷ ṉaṭuvupaṭṭa kuḷappuṉcey ṉila muṉṟu mākkāṇicciṉṉamum Itiṉāl tiruvulakaḷantaruḷivanta mikai ṉilamum maṟṟum Epperp paṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttatu .
Digital edition of SII 23.352 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
